case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. CHAVEZ C LIZETTE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 61333965): MOORE, HARVEY M. SUBSTITUTED FOR LAWLESS, KEVIN AS ATTORNEY FOR CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LIZETTE, CHAVEZ C JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 15153003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIZETTE, CHAVEZ C $2,162.82 PRINCIPAL, $552.56 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,940.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
